since_last: 51% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.00%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -3.16% · Gold +1.14% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 51% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.00%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.00%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.57%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +6.38%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +6.38%, KLAC +5.14%, TER +5.12%, AMAT +4.67%, LRCX +4.61%. Laggards: DDOG -4.31%, WDAY -2.39%, HON -1.92%, SNOW -1.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.80% at $164.92
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.80% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
